I‚Äôm the chosen one see my potential so they fear me
Lately I‚Äôve been praying God I wonder can you hear me

Every day a battle I‚Äôm exhausted and I‚Äôm weary

When they ask if I‚Äôm okay it just make everything seem worse

snippet.title: Talking To Jesus | Elevation Worship & Maverick City
snippet.description:
The official video of "Talking to Jesus" from the album, Old Church Basement, by Elevation Worship and Maverick City. 

Available everywhere now: https://elevationworship.lnk.to/OldChurchBasementYT

"Talking To Jesus" was written by Steven Furtick, Brandon Lake, and Chris Brown.

Lyrics:
Grandma used to pray out loud
By her bed every night
To me it sounded like mumbling
Like she was out of her mind
She said boy this kind of praying is what saved my life
You oughta try it some time
Now I know she was right

She was talking to Jesus
She was talking to Jesus
She‚Äôd been talking to Jesus for all of her life

Mama used to drag me to church
Sunday morning and Wednesday nights
Khaki pants and a polo shirt
Boy I put up a fight
She said, son, one day you‚Äôll thank me for having God in your life
And yeah I know she was right
Yeah my mama was right

Cause now I‚Äôm talking to Jesus
She got me talking to Jesus
She got me talking to Jesus
Yeah my mama was right
Cause now I‚Äôm talking to Jesus
Yeah I love talking to Jesus
And I'll be talking to Jesus
For the rest of my life

What a friend we have in Jesus
What a friend we have in Jesus
What a friend we have in Jesus
Oh

I've got 3 of my own now
Trying to raise them up right
My oldest is 15 and I remember what that was like
Trying to deal with the drama, trying to figure out the questions in life
I‚Äôve been looking for a way to show him how to make it alright

Then he walked in my room while I was saying my prayers the other night
He said I‚Äôll come back later, I can tell you got a lot on your mind
I said it‚Äôs not an interruption, you couldn‚Äôt have picked a better time
Cause I was just talking to Jesus, come over and give it a try

We started talking to Jesus
We started talking to Jesus
We started talking to Jesus
Oh
And now he‚Äôs talking to Jesus
Thank God he‚Äôs talking to Jesus
I hope he‚Äôs talking to Jesus
For the rest of his life

There‚Äôs no wrong way to do it
There‚Äôs no bad time to start
It don't have to sound pretty
Just tell him what‚Äôs on your heart
Cause it‚Äôs not a religion
It‚Äôs more like a friendship
Just talk to your Father
Like you are his kid

Just start talking to Jesus
Just start talking to Jesus
You can talk to Jesus
Whenever you like

Just start talking to Jesus
Just start talking to Jesus
Just keep talking to Jesus
For the rest of your life


Written by Steven Furtick, Brandon Lake, Chris Brown
¬©2021 Music by Elevation Worship Publishing, Bethel Music Publishing  / Maverick City Publishing Worldwide

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It‚Äôs the only channel where you‚Äôll get an authentic look at life at this great club. snippet.title: Why South Africa is still so segregated
snippet.description:
How centuries of division built one of the most unequal countries on earth.

Subscribe to our channel and turn on notifications (üîî) http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

For decades, South Africa was under apartheid: a series of laws that divided people by race. Then, in the 1990s, those laws were dismantled. But many of the barriers they created continue to divide South Africans by skin color - which in turn determines their quality of life, access to jobs, and wealth. Racial division was built into the fabric of cities throughout South Africa, and it still hasn't been uprooted.

That's partly because, while apartheid was the culmination of South Africa's racial divisions, it wasn't the beginning of them. That story starts closer to the 1800s, when the British built a network of railroads that transformed the region's economy into one that excluded most Black people -- and then made that exclusion the law.

Sources and further reading:

If you want to learn more about the railroads and how they impacted Cape Colony‚Äôs economy, check out this paper by Johan Fourie and Alonso Herranz Loncan:
https://academic.oup.com/ereh/article-abstract/22/1/73/3930943?redirectedFrom=fulltext

To understand segregation in South Africa‚Äôs major urban centers, take a look at this paper about segregation and inequality: 
https://www.seri-sa.org/images/SERI_Edged_out_report_Final.pdf

For more information on post-Apartheid cities, you can read this paper by Edgar Pieterse (who we feature in the video):
https://www.africancentreforcities.net/wp-content/uploads/2013/10/post-apartheid_geographies_pieterse_15dec09.pdf 

To explore the history and legacy of District Six, visit the District Six Museum website:
https://www.districtsix.co.za/

Thanks for watching and let us know what you think in the comments!

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who‚Äôs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it‚Äôs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing‚Äôs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√∂fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√∫l Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It‚Äôs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It‚Äôs a vicious cycle.

ŸÄŸÄŸÄŸÄŸÄ

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her household‚Äôs most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular ‚Äì a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing ‚Äúappropriate‚Äù engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the Queen‚Äôs deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Makhadzi - Red Card (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
This hit song by Makhadzi titled "Red Card" comes off her chart  dominating year 2020 album titled "Kokovha". 

The song is about a love relationship where one partner does not publicly declare their love for the other through social media posts. 

Call 081 284 8965 or email music@open-mic.co.za for Makhadzi bookings.

snippet.title: Enhle Mbali and Black Coffee in court
snippet.description: Musician Nkosinathi ‚ÄòBlack Coffee‚Äô Maphumulo and actor Enhle Mbali Mlotshwa were at the Randurg Magistrates Court on 12 April 2020 to discuss a restraining order. The two were once a couple and split up in 2019 after a four-year marriage.

snippet.title: Mozambique: How a massacre unfolded
snippet.description:
More than two weeks on from the terror attack in the town of Palma in Mozambique, around 20-thousand people remain unaccounted for.

The country's authorities have sent hundreds of soldiers into the town and have declared it free of terrorists, but the situation remains precarious. 

Islamic State extremists known as al Shabab say they carried out the attack, though the group has no identifiable leader or ideology. 

Sky's special correspondent Alex Crawford sent this report.

snippet.title: Tragic Details About Prince Philip Revealed
snippet.description:
The longtime consort to Queen Elizabeth II lived a life of privilege and luxury, but he also had a life beset with struggles, sadness, heartbreak, and trauma. He died on April 9, 2021, at home in Windsor Castle. Here are the tragic details of Prince Philip.

In 1947, and at the age of 26, Prince Philip married into the royal family of the United Kingdom. In adherence to old-school traditions amongst the powerful ruling families of Europe, no commoner could marry the future queen of the British realm, and Philip was of suitable lineage and noble birth. Born in 1921, Philip hailed from the royal families of both Greece and Denmark, his birth taking place on the Greek island of Corfu. But in September 1922, scarcely a year after he'd celebrated his first birthday, Philip and his family had to leave Greece, and urgently.

After a major military defeat, Philip's uncle, King Constantine of Greece, abdicated the throne. Philip's father, Prince Andrew, who served in Greece's military under Constantine was accused of treason, and was banished from Greece. The family fled to France via a British naval ship, where baby Philip was reportedly safely smuggled in a fruit crate, according to The Independent.

Keep watching to see Tragic Details About Prince Philip Revealed.

#RoyalFamily #PrincePhilip #Royals

Left on his own as a child | 1:12

In adherence to old-school traditions amongst the powerful ruling families of Europe, no commoner could marry the future queen of the British realm, and Philip was of suitable lineage and noble birth. Born in 1921, Philip hailed from the royal families of both Greece and Denmark, his birth taking place on the Greek island of Corfu. But in September 1922, scarcely a year after he'd celebrated his first birthday, Philip and his family had to leave Greece, and urgently.

After a major military defeat, Philip's uncle, King Constantine of Greece, abdicated the throne. Philip's father, Prince Andrew, who served in Greece's military under Constantine was accused of treason, and was banished from Greece. The family fled to France via a British naval ship, where baby Philip was reportedly safely smuggled in a fruit crate, according to The Independent.

Keep watching to see Tragic Details About Prince Philip Revealed.

snippet.title: Highlights | Manchester City 1-2 Leeds United | Premier League
snippet.description:
Manchester City lost for only the fourth time this season as Stuart Dallas‚Äô stoppage time winner ensured 10-man Leeds United stunned the Premier League leaders at the Etihad Stadium.

Dallas gave Marcelo Bielsa‚Äôs side the lead against the run of play when he fired a low 18-yard drive in off the post shortly before half-time, but the game appeared to swing back in City‚Äôs favour when Liam Cooper was dismissed for a reckless tackle on Gabriel Jesus in first half added time.

Pep Guardiola‚Äôs men were in total control after the break as Leeds tried to protect their lead, but Ferran Torres looked to have rescued a point when he steered Bernardo Silva‚Äôs pass into the bottom corner in the 76th minute.

City continued to pour forward in search of a winner, but were undone by a slick counter-attack when Dallas latched onto Ezgjan Alioski‚Äôs through ball and nutmegged Ederson to seal a smash and grab victory in the 91st minute.

The defeat leaves Guardiola‚Äôs men needing 11-points from our remaining six league games to be crowned champions.

snippet.title: Prince Charles: 'My Dear Papa Was a Very Special Person'
snippet.description:
Prince Charles made a short statement outside Highgrove House this afternoon to mark the passing of his father, the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales commented on his father's seven decades of service to Queen and country. He added that: "My family and I will miss him enormously... My dear Papa was a very special person."

#PrinceCharles #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: ‚ÄúThy Will Be Done‚Äú- Saint Israella Bushiri's Burial Ceremony
snippet.description:
Dont forget to subscribe to get the latest Videos from Prophet Shepherd Bushiri by clicking this link:https://bit.ly/3h2BRFq

‚ÄúMy wife and I are broken but not destroyed. The badness of the devil cannot change the goodness of God. 
It is the wish of every parent to be buried by their children, not the other way around. 
However, when God was calling me, he taught me to bow to his sovereign will. 
I have taught my wife that, I have taught my kids that, and I preach that. 

Are we the first people to go through this? Am I the first person? No. 
You have all gone through this. And be strengthened and be encouraged. What you went through is what we are going through. 

But we all have faith and hope that Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, the same today and the same forever. 
What is remaining for us, with Israella, is not for her to come where we are, but when God, at his own sovereign time comes, we will both go where she is. 
With all our hearts, we have accepted the call of God over our daughter Israella.‚Äù

snippet.title: Tearful Charles & Camilla look at flowers and a mini Land Rover for Prince Philip
snippet.description:
A TEARFUL Prince Charles and Camilla today gazed over flowers and even a mini Land Rover tribute laid in honour for Philip. 

Thousands of floral tributes have been left for the Duke of Edinburgh after he passed away aged 99 - with the messages of condolences gathered at Marlborough House.

The flowers and tributes had been left outside both Windsor Castle and Buckingham Palace, but gently moved to a private area to stop crowds gathering over Covid concerns.

And Prince Charles today appeared reflective as he looked over the sea of flowers in honour of his father the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales was pictured looking at the sincere tributes - which have flooded in from people across the country and the globe.

Continue reading
Tearful Prince Charles and Camilla look at flowers and a mini Land Rover laid by mourners in honour of Philip

snippet.title: F9 - Official Trailer 2
snippet.description:
F9
Fast is back June 25.
http://www.thefastsaga.com/

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past. 

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.  

Vin Diesel‚Äôs Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he‚Äôs going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they‚Äôve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom‚Äôs forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad). 

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe‚Äîfrom London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.  

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚Äù Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar¬Æ winner Helen Mirren and Oscar¬Æ winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom‚Äôs past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.  

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.  www.thefastsaga.com

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her ‚Äòstrength and stay‚Äô | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.‚ÄØ 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the ‚ÄòWidow of Windsor‚Äô.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

snippet.title: Prince Harry will probably ‚Äòlive to regret‚Äô Oprah interview
snippet.description:
Spiked Online Editor Brendan O‚ÄôNeill says Prince Harry will probably ‚Äúlive to regret‚Äù the interview he and Meghan Markle did with Oprah Winfrey shortly before the passing of Prince Philip.

‚ÄúThe truth of the matter is, I think it was wrong for Harry and Meghan to do what they did on Oprah Winfrey ‚Äì to spill the beans, to set the rumour mill running in relation to alleged racism in the Royal Family,‚Äù Mr O‚ÄôNeill told Sky News.

‚ÄúI think it was so wrong for them to do that at a time when Prince Philip was very ill, was probably heading towards the end of his life, when the Queen had a great deal on her mind.

‚ÄúI think that was a mistake for Harry, and I think he will probably live to regret it.‚Äù

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow‚Äã and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How‚Äôs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We‚Äôve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he‚Äôs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you‚Äôll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it‚Äôs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.title: The Real Reason Prince Philip Didn't Like To Eat With The Queen
snippet.description:
The late Prince Phillip was, by all accounts, devoted to his wife for the entirety of their 73-year-long marriage. But even the strongest and most loving couples need some time apart. For Prince Phillip and Queen Elizabeth, meal times were often a solitary affair.

And no, this had nothing to do with the Queen's table manners or Prince Phillip's desire to put his elbows on the table. Instead, the problem had to do with the food options on the table, metaphorically and otherwise. As former royal chef Darren McGrady has said, Prince Phillip had a more diverse food palette than his more culinarily-conservative spouse.

#PrincePhilip #TheQueen #RoyalFamily

Read Full Article: https://www.mashed.com/378749/the-real-reason-prince-philip-didnt-like-to-eat-with-the-queen/

snippet.title: DMX, rapper and actor, dies at 50
snippet.description:
DMX, a rapper known as much for his troubles as his music, has died, his family announced in a statement. He was 50.
"We are deeply saddened to announce today that our loved one, DMX, birth name of Earl Simmons, passed away at 50-years-old at White Plains Hospital with his family by his side after being placed on life support for the past few days," family's statement read in part.
The artist had been hospitalized since last week when he suffered a heart attack at his home in New York, according to his longtime attorney, Murray Richman.
DMX (Dark Man X) began rapping in the early 1990s and released his debut album, "It's Dark and Hell Is Hot," in 1998.
With the deaths of fellow rappers The Notorious B.I.G. and Tupac Shakur before he burst on the scene, DMX became one of the reigning stars of hardcore hip hop and was the premier artist signed to the Ruffhouse Records label.
His single, "Ruff Ryders Anthem," helped to seal his critical and commercial success.
#DMX #CNNBusiness #News

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of ‚ÄòMrs Sri Lanka‚Äô in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning ‚ÄúMrs World‚Äù on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new ‚ÄúMrs Sri Lanka‚Äù. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared ‚ÄúMrs Sri Lanka 2020‚Äù during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were ‚Äúdeeply disturbed and sincerely regret‚Äù the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

‚ÄòMrs World‚Äô arrested for grabbing crown from head of ‚ÄòMrs Sri Lanka‚Äô ‚ñ∫ https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

snippet.title: He took on the entire team himself‚Ä¶ and WON!
snippet.description:
New England Free Jacks took on the Utah Warriors over the weekend in the MLR (Major League Rugby), and as the game ticked towards a half-time scoreline of 3-0, Utah‚Äôs Josh Whippy took on the entire New England team himself, and after a little combination with teammate Bailey Wilson won the battle, and went on to score the first try of the game.

snippet.title: DMX Dead at 50
snippet.description:
DMX has died. The rapper turned 50 in December. His death follows a heart attack he suffered, which was triggered by a drug overdose. Amid DMX‚Äôs hospitalization, a rep for his family told ET that he was in a medical state from which they do not think he will recover. On Monday, a vigil was held by the Ruff Ryders to the Rescue Foundation outside of DMX‚Äôs hospital. The ‚ÄòParty Up‚Äô performer was nominated for three GRAMMY awards, and he won Favorite Rap/Hip-Hop Artist at the American Music Awards in 2000.

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: Prince Philip has died aged 99 @BBC News live üî¥ BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and üîî to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube üëâ https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer üëâ https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband, has died aged 99, Buckingham Palace has announced.

The prince married Princess Elizabeth in 1947, five years before she became Queen, and was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

A statement from Buckingham Palace said: "It is with deep sorrow that Her Majesty The Queen has announced the death of her beloved husband, His Royal Highness The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh.

"His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle."

Follow the story üëâ https://bbc.in/3fYe0J5

snippet.title: Prince Harry Preparing to Return to UK for Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Harry is expected to return to the UK for his grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral.

The Duke of Sussex is making preparations to fly back from his US home, though it was unclear whether his wife, Meghan Markle, or son, Archie, would be returning with him.

It is expected the Duke will be buried in Frogmore Gardens, following a small family service at St George's Chapel in the grounds of Windsor Castle. 

#PrinceHarry #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily
tags: duke of edinburgh becomes prince philip
prince harry and william at dianas funeral

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG‚Äã
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo‚Äã
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR‚Äã
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh üòÇ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

localized.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
localized.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

snippet.title: Bernice West - O Kind (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Luister na 'O Kind' hier: https://BerniceWest.lnk.to/NetGeleen‚Äã

Volg my:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Bernicewestmusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bernicewest_/

Lirieke:

O kind, is daar iets wat jy wil s√™? 
Ek hoor die wolke praat weer stories oor al jou kleure 
bou jy weer huisies by die bure 
gooi jy klippies teen die mure
Skop vas, tel jou kop op as jy praat 

O kind, ek het opgemors, maar ek kla nie 
Trap jy spore van jou eie
moenie huiwer om te vra nie 
Want dis nie geld wat jou siel gaan red nie 
Ook nie geld wat geluk gaan koop nie 
As jy jou hart laat klop stop die dinge wat jou pla
Trek los, luister hardop na goeie raad 

O kind, o kind 
Sal jy jou laaste asem spaar
Dat ek my raad aan jou kan openbaar 
Hou jou naaste aan jou sy 
Luister na wysheid wat jy kry 
Geniet die nou 
Laat jou hart op God vertrou 

O kind, stof jou rakke af
moenie kla nie 
Gooi jou beddings nat met die trane wat jy versamel 
Gooi jou drome in ‚Äòn tas
en trek die skoen aan wat jou pas
vertrek op die ritme van jou hart
Trek los, luister hardop na goeie raad 

O kind, o kind 
Sal jy jou laaste asem spaar
Dat ek my raad aan jou kan openbaar 
Hou jou naaste aan jou sy 
Luister na wysheid wat jy kry 
Geniet die nou 
Laat jou hart op God vertrou 

O kind, na na na 
O kind, na na na
O kind, O kind sal jy jou laaste asem spaar

O kind, daar‚Äôs genade jy hoef nie te vrees nie 
Pas jou hart net op
Gun jouself genot  
moenie kneus nie 
Kyk uit, want ek hou jou fyn dop 

#BerniceWest #NetGeleen #OKind

snippet.title: Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh and consort to the Queen, dies aged 99 | ABC News
snippet.description:
Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh and consort to his wife Queen Elizabeth II for more than 60 years, has died at the age of 99.  The Duke suffered ailing health in recent years and retired from royal duties in 2017. Subscribe: http://ab.co/1svxLVE 

ABC News provides around the clock coverage of news events as they break in Australia and abroad, including the latest coronavirus pandemic updates. It's news when you want it, from Australia's most trusted news organisation.

snippet.title: Dax - "BEATBOX" Freestyle [One Take Video]
snippet.description:
250K LIKES AND YOU UNLOCK THE "WHOOPTY" FREESTYLE...
it's up to YALL... we are the label.

Had to hop in the fun and make a BEATBOX FREEESTYLE FOR THE BEATBOX CHALLENGE. It's been awesome to see so many people hop on the beat. This is what hip hop is about. Shoutout to spotemgottem and dababy for the fire ass song, go check it out if you haven't already. yall def gon want me to do WHOOPTY as well. ima go even harder if that's even possible hahahahah. ITS DAX. all love. is my beatbox freestyle the best?

SOUNDCLOUD (only): 

Follow @thatsdax on EVERYTHING
Shot by: Logan Meis

#Beatbox #freestyle #Remix #Dax

LYRICS:

they say that i'm different
if i flex a gun they would probably fuck with my image
i'm DAX and the shit that I‚Äôve done it could never me mickmed
this shit is exclusive i‚Äôm RUSSIAN the beat like I‚Äôm VLADIMIR PUTINfor every ((BAR)-that-you-(MITZ)-ima-(FUH) you like I‚Äôm going JEWISH) [bar that you miss ima fuck]i promise you niggas we not in the same league
(BarMitzvah)
i (GO)-in-(Bert) I‚Äôm with DONOVAN MITCHELL [utah jazz]
i got more STRIPES than ZEBRA they speak on me FOUL because Dax has been way to OFFICIAL
stay in my lane with my head on a swivel
(X)‚Äôing em out like i‚Äôm MALCOLM and MIDDLE [malcolm x =, malcolm in the middle]
i tried to be nice but these people is KAREN'S so I‚Äôm BLACKING out like my last name is CIVIL [Karen Civil]
i‚Äôm doing LIFE for these BARS every that beat touch ima BODY THAT
bout to fuck TWINS after this so you PUSSIES can call me a COPY CAT
I got a ((CHEVY-IMPALA) with-(PISTONS) I‚Äôm driving
in (PONTIAC), I‚Äôll never ((MICH)AGAIN) I‚Äôm in (DETROIT) with the (BOYS) I got CHIPS like (ISAIAH) and (THOMAS)) had
i‚Äôm a different category
stay IN THE HOUSE in like my name is CORY [cory in the house]
so many FLOWS they get WET when I rap in I could have an ORGY
th-this beat makes me HORNY
once i-CUM-you can‚Äôt ignore me
niggas my SONS they won‚Äôt admit ima have to take they ass and SHOW it on MAURY
AKON nigga imma bout to SMACK THAT
CAN'T BREATHE like I‚Äôm rapping with a GAS MASKswitch gears everytime a nigga fast rap
they too slow I‚Äôm already on my last lap
you‚Äôll get SMOKED you niggas can‚Äôt MATCH that
i‚Äôm so BLUNT you people try to PASS DAX
then try to front like you my DOGS i SEE RIGHT THROUGH YOU like a nigga did a CAT SCAN
do try to front because I know you know
i been BOSS, no HUGO
you USDs while I‚Äôm EUROS
my bars are worth like two times yours
don‚Äôt you make that mistake
independent how I bust in the gate
i do numbers organic i don‚Äôt gotta pay
my shit GOLDEN like STEPHEN and KLAY
i‚Äôm my ZONE in my NATURAL STATE
don‚Äôt gotta WARM UP I‚Äôm HITTING MY SHOT if you throw me throw me the ROCK when i step in the GAME
and i promise i don‚Äôt miss
i stay focused
every songs a MAGNUM OPUS
My rhymes-scheme-(SE(a)RENA) so damn big
it broke the US OPEN (serena williams, us open)
and yes I noticed
niggas never gonna give me my roses
so I stay cooking up this crack and serving it out in potent doses
what you niggas done I done I did that already
you must be JELLY, (JAM)MING my NUTS
my BALLS are too HEAVY
i need some WAP not talking talking bout FETTI,¬Ýi‚Äôm wit the SQUAD like ED EDD and EDDIE,
and if I don‚Äôt pop then this years a flop cuz my shits too hot and can‚Äôt no one tell me¬Ýthat my shit don‚Äôt ROCK-and-ROLL over what‚Äôs on top charts¬ÝI‚Äôm SERVING that LEVY
(so SIT DOWN please I will not STAND for this I am not ALLSTATE
I spit GAS, you people STAY SLEEP, I‚Äôm UP no wonder you're ALL BREAKS)
i‚Äôm getting sick of this
you gon' put some respect on a lyricist
i‚Äôm in HOUSTON-like-ASTROS-I‚Äôm-NOMICAL CHEMICALLY serving up BARS like a PHYSICIST
I been to rapping to far ima
SLOOOOOW take it slow
I gotta SLOOOW DOWN to GET IT GOING
U can‚Äôt replace meI rap in HDI promise niggas DAX is bout the be the place to beFUCK DANIEL!
Upstain I throw HEAT ROCKS im like d-wade when I bowl
I don‚Äôt need a deal to pop I got talent my nigga i don‚Äôt have to sell my soul
But if I do
It‚Äôs over for you
So I gotta
I GOTTA SLOW take it slow
I gotta SLOW DOWN to GET IT GOINGU can‚Äôt replace meI rap in HD
I Promise niggas DAX is bout to be the place to be
FUCK DANIEL!ITS DAX!

snippet.title: Piers Morgan Says Prince Harry & Meghan Markle Interview With Oprah Was a ‚ÄúWhine-a-thon‚Äù I THR News
snippet.description:
Piers Morgan maintained that he does not believe Meghan Markle's claims, including those she made about her mental health, in her and Prince Harry's March 7 interview with Oprah Winfrey. In an interview on Fox Nation's ‚ÄòTucker Carlson Today‚Äô that lasted over an hour and 15 minutes and in which he called the Oprah interview an "undiluted whine-a-thon," Morgan again questioned the veracity of Markle's remarks and blasted "cancel culture" as well as his friend Sharon Osbourne's decision to leave ‚ÄòThe Talk‚Äô after she defended Morgan on-air.

To learn more about this story: 
https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/piers-morgan-maintains-meghan-markle-prince-harry-interview-was-undiluted-whine-a-thon

A 2019 Suffolk University poll named FOX News as the most trusted source for television news or commentary, while a 2019 Brand Keys Emotion Engagement Analysis survey found that FOX News was the most trusted cable news brand. A 2017 Gallup/Knight Foundation survey also found that among Americans who could name an objective news source, FOX News was the top-cited outlet. Owned by FOX Corporation, FNC is available in nearly 90 million homes and dominates the cable news landscape, routinely notching the top ten programs in the genre.

snippet.title: How Mercedes-Benz Is Losing Its Prestige Image
snippet.description:
Mercedes-Benz is perhaps the biggest name in luxury cars globally, and for countless buyers around the world, it is a car brand to aspire to own. The German automaker has a reputation for superb build quality, excellent engineering, and the bragging rights that its founder Carl Benz invented the first production automobile. 

Today, Mercedes-Benz faces a new class of challenges as Tesla has become the aspirational brand for younger consumers. There is a slew of other EV hopefuls vying for the next generation‚Äôs aspirational vehicle‚Äôs mantle. Automakers have had to sink billions into new technologies and contend with a new crop of competitors in the critical Chinese market and around the world.

snippet.title: $1,018 Nike "Satan Shoes" by Lil Nas X Unboxing
snippet.description:
The very unique and limited Satan Shoe is a base Nike Air Max 97 by MSCHF and Lil Nas X, with the air bubble containing 60cc ink and one drop of human blood. Each shoe is uniquely numbered between 1/666 and 666/666 and sells for $1,018. In addition, each shoe has the bible verse Luke 10:18, an upside-down cross, and a handmade bronze pentagram with custom engraving. Satan Shoes Instagram - http://instagram.com/mikethecompass

snippet.description:
Lil Nas X‚Äôs ‚ÄúMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)‚Äù is his latest hit, with the music video racking up over 32 million views since it dropped on Friday. Produced by Roy Lenzo, Omer Fedi, and Take a Daytrip, the song first popped up as an Instagram snippet and later appeared in a Logitech Super Bowl commercial. It is the second single from his upcoming album of the same name, which is expected to drop this summer.

‚ÄúMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)‚Äù is inspired by a former relationship, with lyrics that reflect the artist‚Äôs journey to accepting his sexuality.

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico ‚Äî go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz ‚Äî this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful ‚Äî please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive ‚Äî https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive ‚Äî https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon ‚Äî https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

en.title: The Secret of Synchronization
en.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico ‚Äî go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz ‚Äî this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful ‚Äî please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive ‚Äî https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive ‚Äî https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000
